textByHash.0953fe9a28ef04446279854c75a5e8a0566ec86a: The work cannot be disturbed... the mistress commands it...
textByHash.c1f0274e92a4305534acfd169496d87e14b81b81: You know too much... you must be removed...
textByHash.a244351f541fbfcefc5c1d52ad5c0bf91d7c1fc8: Your false gods will not protect you!
textByHash.934b721a053a5e80413e33d9f00ff3323f5a631f: It's all so unclear... I can't remember...
textByHash.6b36d67abedf5aa1c076f0612a95abd85a39326a: We were told we had an audience with Pharaoh Kemesis, but when we arrived at the palace he wasn't there. It was just this woman.
textByHash.96acbe74f5713f3a3b1fde1d7195793508468de5: I don't know. I just remember her eyes, her deep red eyes...
textByHash.160f9334446700b0355151c35ab08087996e90ec: We came here to find something... I think. A tomb! We unblocked the entrance, and she went inside. There were others with her.
textByHash.635589eea49aad4cb782c0cea4193fba1c741592: I don't know... We never saw the inside. The entrance collapsed again after she went in.
textByHash.746abf4df48bd9688988f3ca168c78f80a3bcf39: Wait! I remember one more thing... there were these monsters helping her! They walked like humans, but they had the heads of insects!
textByHash.492399a7624f4cb5da7ec5b3ce87b57ff4a697cd: Some ruins... To the north east...
